---
title: "Accelerating Finite-Element Structural Elastic Dynamic Analysis Using GPU Computing"
date: 2024-02-01
categories: [conference, gpu, opensees]
venue: "2024 NHERI Computational Symposium, Los Angeles, CA"
description: "GPU computing for finite-element structural elastic dynamic analysis."
---

## Event

**2024 NHERI Computational Symposium**  
Los Angeles, CA · February 1, 2024

## Related links

- [2026 NHERI Computational Symposium talk](/talks/nheri-computational-symposium-2026/index.qmd)
- [Research](/research.qmd)
- [NHERI SimCenter](https://simcenter.designsafe-ci.org/)
